rigor_applied.iprev_trigger: files_estimate>=5; RAN 2026-06-26 -> APPROVED (R1: 8 issues 2H/4M/2L -> REVISE; R2: APPROVED, 5 LOW absorbed). See handoff/REVIEW.md.

interview_answers.protocol: CI cargo check --target gate + CLAUDE.md convention

events.note: R1 found keyring/zbus guaranteed-blockers + CI-gate overselling + D3 mis-scope -> plan revised (keyring per-target backend D7, zbus gated D8, D3 dropped, exhaustive registries, pre-flight empirical check). R2 APPROVED.

Mode B complete. Pre-flight: Linux runner CANNOT cross-check (objc2-exception-helper C build script needs macOS SDK/-arch) -> D5 resolved to macos-latest; local validation via cc-stub wrapper. Edits: Cargo.toml libc->cfg(unix), keyring per-target (apple-native resolves clean), zbus->linux; updater.rs zbus gating + non-Linux no-op reveal; worktree_sessions.rs statvfs u64-widen (NEW blocker not predicted: Darwin f_bavail u32/f_frsize u64) + clippy allow; commands.rs 3x which->which crate; shim.rs find_in_environ gated cfg(any(linux,test)); opencode adapter REVERSED (XDG on macOS per sst#8235, no path change, WHY-comment) + spec corrected; ci.yml macos-cross-check job; CLAUDE.md invariant. Result: macOS check clean (no warnings); Linux clippy -D warnings + 684 tests + fmt + tsc all green. tasks.md 8.4 GUI-smoke is the only human-gated remainder.

implementation.new_finding: statvfs field widths differ on Darwin (f_bavail u32, f_frsize u64) — not predicted by the plan; widened to u64.
implementation.reversal: opencode uses XDG (~/.config/opencode) on macOS too (xdg-basedir, sst#8235) — dirs::config_dir() would have been wrong; no path change, spec corrected.

scope_note: Owns COMPILING on macOS (Cargo.toml libc -> cfg(unix); gate genuinely linux-only ungated seams; establish cargo check --target CI gate). Functional macOS impls are OUT of scope (siblings). Windows std::os::unix gating recorded as deferred.
